name: Snakeskin Shield
description: Notes The Snakeskin Shield may be considered slightly weaker than the T5 Mithril Shield. This shield grants +5 SPD, but it gives 3 less DEF, costs 5 more MP to use, and does slightly lower damage. This shield can be obtained somewhat more easily, though.
effects: Stunned for 3 seconds Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
